title: Craftin Cringelords 2
description: A performant create mod pack with all of the major create addons, as well as overhauled vanilla+ style world generation and additional mobs.
body:
This modpack combines a vanilla+ inspired world with as many create addons as we could manage. The modpack is designed for running a small server with friends and contains several server optimizations as well as local-only tweaks - use the pack on both the server and the client. Our philosophy when making this pack can be summarized as follows:

1. Keep the additional blocks added by mods limited.
2. Add as much variety to mobs as possible without intruding into the gameplay.
3. Add as much balanced Create Mod gameplay as possible.
4. Keep the world relatively performant.
5. Implement all of the standard quality of life mods.
6. Add plenty of extra decoration blocks and nether/end overhaul mods for more variety

The world generation is done with terralith and geophilic to ensure there aren't too many non-vanilla blocks. We used Naturalist and More Mob Variants for a wider selection of animals. Better Nether and Better End are also included, alongside farmer's delight. Both Supplementaries and all of Macaw's mods are included for more decoration opportunities (except Macaw's roofs, triangles no belong in square video game). We also included trinkets and a bunch of MC dungeons items for more weapon and item variety. Item recipes and management is handled with EMI, teleporting is done with Waystones instead of commands and gravestones are included so death isn't as devastating as real life.

Credits:
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
